disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Kansas legislative leaders approve extended monitoring of 3 exposed to hantavirus
updates.summary_zh: 美国堪萨斯州议会批准对3名汉坦病毒暴露者延长监测。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship grows to 13 cases CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮关联汉坦病毒疫情增至13例。

updates.title_en: Cruise Ship Hantavirus Outbreak Grows To 13 Cases As Spain Confirms Another Infected Passenger
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙确认新增1例邮轮汉坦病毒病例，总数达13例。

updates.title_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster - Morocco World News
updates.body_en: WHO Reports 13 Hantavirus Cases Tied to Cruise Ship Cluster Morocco World News
updates.summary_zh: WHO报告邮轮集群汉坦病毒病例达13例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases from cruise outbreak rise to 13 following new case in Spain , WHO says
updates.summary_zh: WHO称西班牙邮轮疫情病例增至13例。

updates.title_en: Spain confirms 2nd Hantavirus case after cruise ship evacuation
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙确认邮轮疏散后第2例汉坦病毒病例。
WHO确认第13例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked - People.com
updates.body_en: MV Hondius Cruise Ship Will Proceed with Next Voyage 34 Days After Hantavirus Outbreak Passengers Disembarked People.com
updates.summary_zh: MV Hondius邮轮在疫情34天后将恢复航行。

updates.title_en: US Restricts Disease Experts from Communicating With WHO Amid Ebola Outbreak and Global Health , Reports Reveal
updates.summary_zh: 美国限制疾病专家与WHO沟通。

updates.title_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK - Pharmacy Business
updates.body_en: Health Officials Monitor Hantavirus Cases in UK Pharmacy Business
updates.summary_zh: 英国卫生官员监测汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO - Mint
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Case count hits 13 as another MV Hondius passenger tests positive in Spain; situation stable, says WHO Mint
updates.summary_zh: WHO称西班牙MV Hondius邮轮汉坦病毒病例增至13例，情况稳定。

updates.title_en: Traws Pharma Announces Antiviral Program Targeting Ongoing Hantavirus and Ebola Virus Disease Outbreaks
updates.summary_zh: Traws Pharma宣布针对汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情的抗病毒项目。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 - politico.eu
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship outbreak rise to 13 politico.eu
updates.summary_zh: 与邮轮爆发相关的汉坦病毒病例升至13例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cruise outbreak rises with new case in Spain
updates.summary_zh: 西班牙邮轮汉坦病毒爆发新增一例。

updates.title_en: Ebola outbreak spreading faster than can be controlled warns WHO
updates.summary_zh: WHO警告埃博拉疫情扩散速度超出控制能力。
